headline: Jabil Inc (NYSE:JBL) Emerges as a Top Growth at a Reasonable Price (GARP) Pick
summary: Jabil Inc (JBL) exemplifies GARP investing with strong earnings growth, solid profitability, and a reasonable valuation compared to industry peers.
